target.title: fix(discord): hydrate reply context metadata
target.body:
## Summary

- Hydrate Discord inbound messages through REST when a reply `message_reference` is present but Discord omitted `referenced_message`, while avoiding forwarded references and known-deleted replies.
- Expose full reply metadata through plugin hook contracts: `replyToIdFull` and `replyToIsQuote` now flow through inbound hooks and `before_dispatch` event/context payloads.
- Update hook docs to describe the first-class reply metadata fields available to plugin authors.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.hydration.test.ts src/hooks/message-hook-mappers.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` (clean: no accepted/actionable findings)
- Testbox-through-Crabbox changed gate: `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox --blacksmith-org openclaw --blacksmith-workflow .github/workflows/ci-check-testbox.yml --blacksmith-job check --blacksmith-ref main --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 240m --timing-json -- corepack pnpm check:changed`; provider `blacksmith-testbox`, id `tbx_01kt8wwzkay11kjsaece1z2hyn`, exit 0

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Discord replies that arrive with `message_reference` but without `referenced_message` now get hydrated before reply context is resolved, and reply-capable channel metadata is exposed through shared plugin hook fields.

Real environment tested: Local source checkout for targeted Vitest; Blacksmith Testbox through Crabbox for changed typecheck/lint/guards.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.hydration.test.ts src/hooks/message-hook-mappers.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts`; `corepack pnpm check:changed` via Testbox-through-Crabbox `tbx_01kt8wwzkay11kjsaece1z2hyn`.

Evidence after fix: Focused Vitest passed 3 shards / 208 tests; Testbox changed gate exited 0 after core, extension, test, docs, lint, typecheck, and guard lanes.

Observed result after fix: Reply-reference hydration fills the quoted message body when Discord omitted it; known-deleted and forwarded references are not fetched; plugin hooks receive `replyToIdFull` and `replyToIsQuote` consistently in inbound and `before_dispatch` payloads.

What was not tested: A live Discord gateway event was not exercised; coverage is mocked Discord REST/message objects plus changed-gate static validation.
target.author: fuller-stack-dev

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
